steps.title: Identify the constraint
steps.content: Farmers have no access to inorganic additives (no NPK fertilizer). Eliminate any option containing NPK — that rules out D.

steps.title: Pick the best non-inorganic combo
steps.content:
Among compost alone, biochar alone, and biochar + compost, the table shows the biochar + compost combination produces the greatest fruit weight and size. So choice C — biochar and compost — gives the largest improvement.

That confirms C is correct.
